title: Self-Reflective Retrieval-Augmented Generation

defines.name: SELF-RAG
defines.definition: A retrieval-augmented generation framework that trains a single language model to decide when to retrieve, critique its own outputs, and generate with reflection tokens for improved factuality and controllability.

problem: Standard RAG systems retrieve passages indiscriminately and do not explicitly assess whether retrieved evidence improves generation quality or factual consistency.
